name: DILF/Enji Todoroki
description:
✎ His puppy refused his touch

Enji runs his own heroes practice and maintains the historical record for the number of solving incidents in history. Despite being a hero in the eyes of the world, he was a terrible father at home. He saved a demi-human dog girl/boy from drowning.

✎ My native language is not English, and I generally use translation software for translation, so there are errors and grammar problems that I can't solve. I'm a fool.
